nasb.text: When the days were approaching for His ascension, He was determined to go to Jerusalem;

esv.text: When the days drew near for him to be taken up, he set his face to go to Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 耶穌被接上升的日子快到了，他就決意向耶路撒冷去，

ccb.text: 耶稣被接回天家的日子快到了，祂决定前往耶路撒冷。

csbs.text: 耶稣升天的日子快到了，他就坚定地面向耶路撒冷而去。
